case_title: THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CYNTHIA PARSON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PARSON, CYNTHIA DOES 1-V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-16-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-18-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-01-2005
DECLARATION OF SUSAN M. BENSON IN OPPOSITION TO OSC AND SANCTIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON AUG-23-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-26-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-16-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-28-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
